refresh_cadence: infrequent / on-demand — sprite art doesn't change once posted, unlike OP.GG's daily change detection
records_captured: Champions-menu sprite image manifest (Category:Champions_menu_sprites): one row per image with its local cache path and resolved CDN metadata

fields.name: bulbagarden_title
fields.description: Raw MediaWiki file title, e.g. "File:Menu CP 0003-Mega.png"

fields.name: pokedex_number_raw
fields.description: 4-digit Pokédex number parsed from the title, prior to normalization

fields.name: form_suffix_raw
fields.description: Form descriptor parsed from the title (e.g. "Mega", "Paldea Aqua"), prior to normalization; empty for base forms

fields.name: local_cache_path
fields.description: Path of the downloaded image file, relative to the extractor's cache_dir (default data/assets/bulbagarden/)

fields.name: sha1
fields.description: SHA-1 checksum reported by the MediaWiki API, used for incremental-refresh skip-if-unchanged checks

fields.name: mime_type
fields.description: Image MIME type reported by the MediaWiki API

fields.name: file_size_bytes
fields.description: Image file size in bytes reported by the MediaWiki API

fields.name: source_url
fields.description: Resolved CDN download URL for this image

fields.name: dataset_version
fields.description: Dataset version this staging snapshot feeds

known_risks: Category membership or file-naming convention could change without notice

form_suffix_raw doesn't necessarily map 1:1 onto PokéAPI's form_name convention (needs a controlled mapping seed, same risk class as OP.GG's custom form labels) — see dbt/seeds/bulbagarden_title_to_pokeapi_form.csv
Sustained/scheduled automated access rate-limiting or ToS posture not independently verified beyond a one-off extract
